sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Stryker restores most manufacturing after cyberattack
feed.summary: Medical technology company Stryker has restored most of its manufacturing sites and critical lines approximately two weeks after experiencing a cyberattack on March 11. The company's electronic ordering system has also been restored, and they are making progress on underlying systems supporting production and fulfillment. The attack, claimed by an Iran-linked threat actor named Handala, also caused delays in procedures and affected operations until the company contained it and began restoring services.

feed.title: Vanguard (NTAP) amendment shows 0% beneficial ownership after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 12 to Schedule 13G/A for NetApp Inc (NTAP), reporting 0% beneficial ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, as guided by SEC Release No. 34-39538. This filing indicates a procedural reporting modification rather than a market sale of shares.

feed.title: Domino’s Pizza Stock Is Down 15% in 2026. Here’s What the Valuation Model Says
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) stock, despite a 5% jump after strong Q4 2025 earnings where it beat U.S. same-store sales and revenue estimates, has fallen 15% in 2026 due to investor concerns over international trends, high leverage, and valuation. A TIKR valuation model suggests DPZ could reach $494 per share by December 2028, implying a 37.9% total return, based on assumptions of 5.2% annual revenue growth, 19.9% operating margins, and an 18.1x P/E multiple. The analysis indicates potential for solid returns if U.S. same-store sales remain healthy, margins improve, and the market accepts its debt-heavy but cash-generative model.

feed.title: Reese Witherspoon Touts Parisian Fun With Wells Fargo Journey Card 03/30/2026
feed.summary: Reese Witherspoon stars in a new Wells Fargo ad campaign for its Autograph Journey credit card, promoting Parisian fun and experiences. Directed by Taika Waititi and with creative by BBDO, the ads show Witherspoon enjoying Paris, focusing on slowing down and experiencing travel rather than just working. This campaign builds on previous ads featuring global destinations to highlight the card's rewards.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) offers $2.659M senior notes due 2036 at 5.10%
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (GS) is offering $2.659 million in fixed-rate senior notes due March 27, 2036, with an annual interest rate of 5.10%. The notes will be issued at 100% of principal, with net proceeds to the issuer of 98.938% after an underwriting discount. These notes will not be listed on any exchange and interest payments will commence on March 27, 2027.

feed.title: UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE:UMH) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE:UMH) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from six analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $18.00. The company recently missed Q4 earnings and revenue expectations, reporting ($0.01) EPS and $66.97 million in revenue. Despite a high dividend payout ratio of 1,285.71%, UMH offers a 6.2% dividend yield, and institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings in the real estate investment trust.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Products See Growth Amid Transformation into AI-Powered Enterprise Platform
feed.summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE: NOW), a cloud-based software company, is highlighted by Columbia Global Technology Growth Fund in its Q4 2025 investor letter. Despite recent stock losses and concerns over its acquisition of Armis, the company's transformation into an AI-powered enterprise platform is seen as compelling, with products gaining traction in large deals and a target of $1 billion in AI annual contract value. ServiceNow ranks 25th in popularity among hedge funds.

feed.title: Danaher Corp. Stock: Business Model Strength and Key Investor Catalysts Ahead of Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Danaher Corp. (US2358511028) showcases a robust business model in life sciences and diagnostics, driven by a decentralized operating structure and strategic acquisitions. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.40 per share and is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 21, providing key insights into its financial performance and the integration of the Masimo acquisition. Investors are monitoring these developments closely, alongside analyst expectations, to assess Danaher's continued growth and value in North American portfolios.

feed.title: Unity Software (NYSE:U) Shares Gap Up on Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Unity Software (NYSE:U) shares gapped up after Bank of America raised its price target from $19 to $21 due to strong preliminary Q1 results and plans to exit non-strategic ad businesses. Despite this upgrade and other analyst support, the stock faces mixed views, insider selling, and technical concerns, trading below key moving averages with expected negative EPS for the year. Institutional investors have notably increased their positions in the company, highlighting a divergence in sentiment compared to some analyst cautions.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) Price Target Cut to $219.00 by Analysts at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America analysts adjusted their price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $219.00 from $225.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of over 33% from the stock's current price. The company recently reported mixed quarterly results, with EPS beating expectations but revenue falling short.

feed.title: TripAdvisor (NASDAQ:TRIP) Shares Gap Up After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: TripAdvisor (NASDAQ:TRIP) shares gapped up after Bank of America upgraded the stock from Neutral to Buy, setting a new price target of $15.00. This upgrade follows a period of mixed analyst sentiment and a recent quarterly earnings miss, where the company reported $0.04 EPS against an estimated $0.15. Institutional investors hold approximately 99% of the company's shares.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. Stock: Analyst Outperform Ratings and Undervaluation Signal Potential Upside for Invest
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods reinstated an "Outperform" rating on MetLife Inc. shares with an $87 price target, reflecting confidence in the insurer's operational strengths and diversified global footprint. The company's stock shows signs of undervaluation, with an estimated fair value suggesting significant upside from current levels. MetLife's diversified business model across various segments and geographies, coupled with steady analyst support, makes it an attractive prospect for North American investors despite facing interest rate sensitivity and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Teleflex (NYSE:TFX) Shares Gap Up Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Teleflex (NYSE:TFX) shares gapped up after Raymond James upgraded the stock from "market perform" to "outperform" with a $128 price target. This upgrade comes despite the company reporting a significant earnings and revenue miss and issuing conservative FY2026 guidance. Analyst coverage for Teleflex is currently mixed, with institutional investors holding a large majority of the stock.

feed.title: Will TSM's Aggressive Capex Plan Strengthen Its Foundry Dominance?
feed.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM) plans to invest $52 billion to $56 billion in 2026, a significant increase from 2025, to maintain its lead in advanced chip manufacturing, particularly for AI and high-performance computing. This aggressive capital expenditure, primarily focused on 3-nanometer and 2-nanometer nodes, is coupled with global expansion in the U.S., Germany, Japan, and Taiwan to meet customer demand and secure its supply chain. Despite competition from Intel and GlobalFoundries, TSM aims for 30% revenue growth in 2026, with strong analyst estimates supporting its outlook.

feed.title: Tuya Grants RSUs to Employees Under 2024 Share Scheme
feed.summary: Tuya Inc. has announced the grant of 100,000 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) to four employees under its 2024 Share Scheme. These RSUs, which have no purchase price and vest over 24 to 48 months with a 12-month cliff, are intended to incentivize and retain staff. This move utilizes existing scheme capacity, leaving substantial shares for future grants, and complies with Hong Kong listing rules.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Occidental Petroleum Price Target to $73 From $53, Maintains Equal Weight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Occidental Petroleum to $73 from $53, while maintaining an "Equal Weight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook by the financial institution on the oil and gas company. Occidental Petroleum is a major oil and gas exploration and production company, with significant operations in the United States.

feed.title: Apple discontinues a popular product. What we know.
feed.summary: Apple has reportedly discontinued its Mac Pro tower desktop computer, a product commonly used by creative professionals that had not received a significant update since 2023. The discontinuation follows the introduction of several new Apple products in early March, including a new iPhone and iPad, and comes as newer, more powerful, and less expensive options like the Mac Studio have surpassed the Mac Pro's capabilities.

feed.title: [ARS] STEEL DYNAMICS INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) on March 27, 2026, at 10:42 AM. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a brief overview of recent news, other SEC filings, and key stock data for Steel Dynamics Inc.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Eyes First-of-Its-Kind Solid Waste Facility in Quintana Roo
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is partnering with Maritime Procurement Services (MPS) to develop a pioneering solid waste management facility in Mahahual, Quintana Roo, Mexico. This new facility will use advanced technologies to sort and process waste, aiming to reduce landfill dependence and foster sustainable growth in the region. The initiative is linked to Royal Caribbean's plans for a new private island destination in Mahahual.

feed.title: United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE:UMC) Given Consensus Rating of "Reduce" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have given United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE:UMC) a consensus "Reduce" rating, with an average one-year target price of $8.60. The company recently reported Q4 EPS of $0.13, beating consensus, but revenue of $1.80 billion missed estimates. Institutional investors have made changes to their positions in UMC, with 5.05% of the stock owned by such entities.

feed.title: McDonald's Corporation Stock: A Resilient Global Leader in Quick-Service Dining Faces Evolving Consu
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation remains a resilient global leader in quick-service dining, leveraging its franchise-heavy model, iconic brand, and adaptable strategies to navigate evolving consumer and economic pressures. The company's core business model relies on a dominant franchise system, menu innovation, digital transformation, and strategic global expansion, especially in emerging markets. Despite risks like inflation, labor shortages, and intense competition, its dividend aristocrat status and strong cash generation make it an attractive and stable investment for North American portfolios.

feed.title: [424B2] JPMORGAN CHASE & CO Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has priced $1,516,000 of Callable Contingent Interest Notes due March 28, 2031, linked to the iShares® MSCI EAFE ETF and the S&P 500® Index. These notes offer contingent monthly interest at a 10.20% annual rate if both underlying assets are at or above 70% of their initial values on review dates, with the issuer potentially redeeming them early starting June 30, 2026. Investors face credit risk from JPMorgan, potential principal loss if the lesser performing underlying falls below 60% of its initial value, and limited liquidity.

feed.title: Starbucks stock slides as technical breakdown follows weak earnings and high volatility
feed.summary: Starbucks stock (SBUX) has fallen 3.32% to $88.19, trading below its major moving averages, indicating strong bearish momentum. Despite a 5.5% revenue increase and long-term sustainability efforts, technical indicators point to continued selling pressure, with the stock expected to consolidate between $87.50 and $90.80. Analysts suggest monitoring the $87.50 level as a critical inflection point, while confidence in the company's turnaround plan remains despite short-term weakness.

feed.title: Cognizant Technology Solutions stock hits 52-week low at $58.86
feed.summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) stock reached a 52-week low of $58.86, marking a 22.09% decline over the past year and trading 32% below its 52-week high. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, offering a 2.17% dividend yield at a P/E ratio of 13.3. The company is actively pursuing strategic initiatives like the Cognizant AI Factory and a partnership with DAMAC Group, while navigating market challenges reflected in reduced price targets from analysts like TD Cowen and BMO Capital.

feed.title: Booking Holdings stock drops 2.97% as company spotlights Asian night market destinations
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock dropped 2.97% today as its Agoda platform promoted Asian night market destinations. The company's stock is experiencing sustained bearish pressure, trading well below key moving averages, with momentum indicators showing strong sell signals. Analysts expect the stock to consolidate between $4,010 and $4,220 next week, with a low probability of a rebound and risk of further downside.
